fields.field_member_role: The Backbone. The Builder. The Pitmaster.
fields.field_member_bio: Cody is our all-around maintenance guru, groundskeeper, carpenter, and master of slow-and-low meats. If it needs fixing, building, grilling, or protecting — Cody's your guy. He's the handsome brawn who proudly watches over his mama and sister, making sure the Tree House always looks its best and runs smoothly.
